svg.title: BodaShield complete system architecture
svg.desc: Five layers: physical sensing on the vehicle, edge signal processing on the ESP32, alert dispatch through the Flask server, Africa's Talking APIs, and owner interfaces.

g.text: Laptop mic (demo) or piezo sensor (production) clamped to fuel tank

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the FFT and TinyML classification step in detail')
g.text: Edge processing — ESP32 + laptop ML script
FFT frequency analysis → RandomForest classifies pump / slosh / siphon

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when the siphon is detected for 3 consecutive windows?')
sendPrompt('What does the ingest endpoint store and why?')
sendPrompt('What does the Flask server do beyond forwarding alerts?')
g.text: Fires AT Voice + SMS with GPS link

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the dashboard show in real time?')
sendPrompt('Why is the AT Voice call more effective than SMS for a midnight theft?')
sendPrompt('What information does the alert SMS contain?')
sendPrompt('How does the USSD tree work and what can the owner check?')
sendPrompt('What does the live dashboard show the fleet owner?')

svg.text: Click any layer to explore it in detail
